description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray, with large windows and multiple entry points. The front features a paved driveway leading to a double garage, a small garden area, and a covered porch with columns. The backyard includes a patio with outdoor furniture, a swimming pool, and a children's play area with a swing set and playhouse. Mature trees and landscaping surround the property, providing shade and privacy. The house has a mix of open and enclosed spaces, with a focus on functionality and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, and landscaped outdoor areas including a pool and playset.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, main entry porch, and landscaped front yard with a car parked.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the backyard with a playset, swing, and mature trees, as well as the back of the house.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the patio area, swimming pool, outdoor furniture, and rear facade with large windows.
description_view_3: Side view featuring the garage, driveway, and a partial view of the backyard amenities and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped in vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with columns, steps, and a modern door, integrated with the driveway and landscaped front yard.
